tools.name: list_mindmaps
tools.description: Lists mindmaps. Optional search filters title; limit caps results.

tools.name: read_mindmap
tools.description: Returns layout_algorithm, nodes (layout, color, shape, collapsed), edges (kind, type), counts.

tools.name: mindmap_exists
tools.description: Checks whether a mindmap_id exists and returns lightweight metadata (title, node_count, edge_count) when found.

tools.name: create_mindmap
tools.description: Creates a mindmap. Optional root_label overrides default root text.

tools.name: add_node
tools.description: Adds a text node. If parent_node_id is set, creates a hierarchy edge from parent to the new node.

tools.name: connect_nodes
tools.description: Creates a link edge between two existing nodes with optional label.

tools.name: style_mindmap_node
tools.description: Sets node styling: color (hex e.g. #e95b45, or default to reset), shape (rectangle, pill, circle), and/or collapsed (boolean to hide/show subtree via hierarchy).

tools.name: style_mindmap_subtree
tools.description: Applies the same node styling to every node under anchor_node_id via hierarchy edges (direct and nested children). Does not follow plain link edges. Anchor is excluded unless include_anchor is true.

tools.name: style_mindmap_edge
tools.description: Sets edge draw style (solid, dashed, dotted, double, arrow, bidirect).

tools.name: apply_mindmap_layout
tools.description: Recomputes node positions from hierarchy edges using TreeVertical, TreeHorizontal, or Radial. Pass layout_algorithm or use the mindmap's current mode.

tools.name: open_mindmap
tools.description: Opens the mindmap editor for the given mindmap id.
